diagrams.title: ML Types Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the three main categories of Machine Learning and their subcategories
diagrams.purpose: Understanding ML taxonomy and problem types

diagrams.title: Neural Network Architecture
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a basic feedforward neural network
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how neural networks process information

diagrams.title: Training Pipeline
diagrams.description: Complete ML workflow from data collection to model deployment
elements: Data Collection → Data Preprocessing → Feature Engineering → Model Training → Evaluation → Deployment → Monitoring

diagrams.title: Overfitting vs Underfitting
diagrams.description: Comparison of model performance on training vs test data
elements: Overfitting: High training accuracy, low test accuracy
Underfitting: Low training and test accuracy
Good Fit: Balanced performance on both datasets
